name: Accessible Adventures
description: Providing outdoor adventure experiences for individuals with disabilities, including adaptive hiking, kayaking, camping, and nature exploration programs that build confidence and community.

name: Inclusion Films
description: A nonprofit film production company creating documentaries and short films that spotlight people with disabilities, challenge stereotypes, and promote inclusion through powerful storytelling.

name: Adaptive Sports Connection
description: Offering year-round adaptive sports programming including skiing, cycling, water sports, and team sports for children and adults with physical and cognitive disabilities.
